58	alsa_output.pci-0000_6c_00.6.analog-stereo.monitor	PipeWire	s32le 2ch 48000Hz	RUNNING
59	alsa_input.pci-0000_6c_00.6.analog-stereo	PipeWire	s32le 2ch 48000Hz	RUNNING
